summary: Single-chunk round-trip test: delete one chunk_embeddings row, re-run embed_corpus.py for that chunk, confirm row is rewritten correctly

resolution.note: Live round-trip against ollama/nomic-embed-text: deleted chunk_embeddings row for gnosticism.gospel-of-thomas.001, ran embed_corpus.py --resume --tradition gnosticism --text gospel-of-thomas, row correctly re-inserted (dim=768, blob=3072B, unit norm). New row is tagged ollama/nomic-embed-text (provider-prefixed), proving the rewritten SQLite path executed — old migration-inserted rows were tagged just 'nomic-embed-text'. Values within float32 rounding of the original.
